source.name: AI Deadlines (mlciv.com)
source.note: Deadlines are cross-checked against mlciv.com/ai-deadlines. Unconfirmed deadlines are marked TBA rather than guessed.

conferences.name: ACL 2026
conferences.long: 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
conferences.note: Presented DIA-HARM — Social Impact Paper Award. Jason served as Area Chair.

conferences.name: ICML 2026
conferences.note: Two position papers accepted: Dual Curse of Multilingual AI + Contamination-Resistant Benchmarks.

conferences.name: KDD 2026
conferences.long: 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
conferences.note: BLUFF accepted in Datasets and Benchmarks Track.

conferences.name: EMNLP 2026
conferences.long: Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
conferences.note: Two preprints being prepped for submission (Lost in Dialect; Spoken Hallucinations). Submitted via ACL Rolling Review.

conferences.name: NeurIPS 2026
conferences.long: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
conferences.note: Watching Datasets & Benchmarks track for a BLUFF-style extension. Dates and deadlines TBA.

conferences.name: AAAI 2027
conferences.note: Broad AI venue; possible home for multilingual safety evaluation.

conferences.name: EACL 2027
conferences.long: 20th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics
conferences.note: Submission via ACL Rolling Review; deadlines TBA.

conferences.name: ICLR 2027
conferences.note: Considering an evaluation-methods submission on multilingual reward-model failure modes. Deadlines TBA.

conferences.name: FAccT 2027
conferences.long: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency
conferences.note: Natural home for the dialect-fairness and community-led harm-spec work. Dates and deadlines TBA.

conferences.name: NAACL 2027
conferences.long: Conference of the North American Chapter of the ACL
conferences.note: Target venue for a DIA-HARM-style extension to speech. Dates and deadlines TBA.

conferences.name: ACL 2027
conferences.long: 65th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
conferences.note: Primary submission target for full lab papers in 2027. Submission via ACL Rolling Review.
